violations.text: Sausage patties were observed held at 62-64 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC placed tray of sausages in walk-in cooler for active cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/14/2025
